lp2.voiceBody: Tap the mic and talk like you would to a friend. Lumi's AI pulls out the amount, merchant, and category — no forms, no menus, no typing.
lp2.voiceQuote: Coffee, five euros. Metro, two euros.
lp2.voiceBenefit3: Logs amount, merchant, and category in one go
lp2.probTitle: Tired of apps that just show you charts?
lp2.probPain1: Manual entry is homework nobody wants to do
lp2.probSolution1: Scan a receipt in 2 seconds. AI reads amount, date, merchant, items — in any language.
lp2.probPain2: I don't want to give my bank credentials to an app
lp2.probSolution2: Lumi never asks for bank access. Your data stays on your device.
lp2.probPain3: I travel — my budget app only works in USD
lp2.probSolution3: Track expenses in dollars, euros, yen — any currency. Auto-conversion at real rates.
lp2.howStep1Desc: Pay with Apple Pay like you always do. No extra app, no unlocking.
lp2.howStep2Desc: The expense appears with a category already suggested — tap to confirm.
lp2.howStep3Desc: Saved, categorized, and added to your forecast automatically.
lp2.featBackTapDesc: Double-tap the back of your iPhone. No unlocking, no finding the app. Lumi opens in recording mode — expense logged in under 3 seconds.
lp2.featApplePayDesc: Pay contactless. The expense appears in Lumi automatically — amount, merchant, timestamp. Zero manual entry required.
lp2.featForecastDesc: Lumi compares your current spend rate against 3 months of history and shows exactly where you'll land — 7–10 days before month-end.
lp2.featScannerDesc: Point at any receipt — paper or screen. AI reads amount, date, merchant, and category in seconds. Works in any language.
lp2.featVoiceDesc: Tap the mic and say "coffee 5 euros." AI parses the amount, merchant, and category from natural speech — no typing.
lp2.featBudgetsDesc: Set monthly limits per category. Lumi tracks live progress and warns you before you overspend — not after.
lp2.featCurrenciesDesc: Real-time conversion. Track in multiple currencies simultaneously. Perfect for travel or multi-currency income.
lp2.compTitle: How Lumi compares to other budget apps
lp2.testTitle2: Loved by people who hate spreadsheets.
lp2.testQuote1: Manual entry is homework nobody wants to do
lp2.testResponse1: That's why Lumi scans receipts. Zero typing.
lp2.testQuote2: Why do all budget apps want my bank login?
lp2.testResponse2: Lumi doesn't. Your data stays on your phone.
lp2.testQuote3: I travel constantly and no app handles multiple currencies well
lp2.testResponse3: Lumi tracks any currency with auto-conversion at real rates.
lp2.testFooter: Analyzed 18 competitors. Lumi is the only app combining AI scanning + multi-currency + privacy.
lp2.priceTitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
